lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just wondering if you were still here.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Of course I'm still here.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: I'm not going near that crack in the wall again.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Rock falls and so on are fine, but sea monsters in caves - never!

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down in these caves?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: I'm waiting to work on the excavations...

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: ...though I don't really want to start digging again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not? I thought digging was something dwarves were good at.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Not with monsters like that one in those caves.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: It had huge teeth and flaming red eyes, and was almost the size of the tunnel!

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: If it attacks the town...

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Are you an adventurer, by any chance?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Adventurer and Regent of Miscellania.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: In that case, could you go and deal with that monster?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: I don't want to have to face it again if it attacks the town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course. Dealing with monsters is what I do best!

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: You'll need to get into the other caves first, of course.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: There's a crack in the wall where the others are digging, but the rocks are loose, and can fall on you if you're not careful.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: I can give you a mining prop to keep them from falling, if you give me a minute to find it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, so all I have to do is get through that wall?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: No, after that the only way you can get further is climbing up onto a high ledge, then crawling through a tunnel.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: But the walls are slippery...

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: ...and I think I might have broken the lift when I fell off it on my way back.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: You'll probably need to fix the lift - I doubt you'd be able to climb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And the monster's behind that tunnel?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Somewhere behind it. I couldn't get very far, what with the flooding in the tunnel.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: There's some rope and some planks near the broken lift - those would probably come in handy.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Ah, here's that mining prop. I knew I had it somewhere.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Here you go. Good luck with fighting that monster.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why bother? It can't get through solid rock.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: That's what I thought, until I saw the sheer size of it. This thing probably MADE the tunnels!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And you're sending me in to deal with it alone?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: I've heard stories from the Miscellanians. If you're the Regent, you must be quite a strong hero.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: So what are you worried about? You probably eat monsters like that for breakfast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't put it quite like that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I'll help you after all. Now, how do I find this monster?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: You'll need to get into the other caves first, of course.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: There's a crack in the wall where the others are digging, but the rocks are loose, and can fall on you if you're not careful.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: I can give you a mining prop to keep them from falling, if you give me a minute to find it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, so all I have to do is get through that wall?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: No, after that the only way you can get further is climbing up onto a high ledge, then crawling through a tunnel.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: But the walls are slippery...

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: ...and I think I might have broken the lift when I fell off it on my way back.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: You'll probably need to fix the lift - I doubt you'd be able to climb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And the monster's behind that tunnel?

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Somewhere behind it. I couldn't get very far, what with the flooding in the tunnel.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: There's some rope and some planks near the broken lift - those would probably come in handy.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Ah, here's that mining prop. I knew I had it somewhere.

lines.speaker: Donal
lines.text: Here you go. Good luck with fighting that monster.
